text: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France.
William Shakespeare wrote many famous plays, including Hamlet, Macbeth, and Othello.
Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius under standard atmospheric pressure.
Albert Einstein developed the theory of relativity.
Plants absorb carbon dioxide from the atmosphere during photosynthesis.
Mount Everest is the tallest mountain above sea level on Earth.
Leonardo da Vinci painted the Mona Lisa.
The chemical symbol for gold is Au.
The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest ocean on Earth.
Berlin is the capital of Germany.
Mars is often called the red planet.
Vincent van Gogh painted The Starry Night.
Silver has the chemical symbol Ag.
The Atlantic Ocean lies between the Americas and Europe and Africa.
Isaac Newton formulated the laws of motion and universal gravitation.
K2 is the second-highest mountain in the world.
Oxygen is essential for respiration in many living organisms.
Rome is the capital city of Italy.
Mercury is the smallest planet in the Solar System.
